29.reason: [Error: Should use Graph[tmp][i] instead of Graph[v][i] to check neighbors of the current vertex tmp]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The variable 'v' is used instead of 'tmp'. In BFS, we should explore neighbors of the currently dequeued node ('tmp'), not the starting node ('v'). This causes incorrect traversal order or missing nodes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The variable 'v' is used instead of 'tmp'. In BFS, we should explore neighbors of the currently dequeued node ('tmp'), not the starting node ('v'). This causes incorrect traversal order and potentially missing nodes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, when enqueueing neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the starting vertex) instead of 'tmp' (the current vertex being processed). This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal order or missing vertices.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, when enqueueing neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the original start vertex) instead of 'tmp' (the current vertex being processed). This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal order or missing vertices.]
